clients.name: Bitdefender
clients.description: Global enterprise cybersecurity company. AndIron manages their Australian and APAC communications, covering enterprise security, compliance, and threat intelligence across Australia, Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, and Hong Kong.
clients.context: Bitdefender is positioning itself as the enterprise cybersecurity partner of choice across APAC. Key comms angles include: APAC regulatory changes (especially Hong Kong's Cybersecurity Ordinance / Critical Infrastructure Law 2026), the IT skills and burnout crisis making outsourced security more relevant, AI-powered threats requiring AI-powered defences, and compliance as a business enabler not just a cost. News about APAC cyber regulation, critical infrastructure attacks, ransomware impacting regional enterprises, and cybersecurity skills shortages are all high-priority. AndIron pitches Bitdefender spokespeople as expert commentators on these trends to Australian and APAC trade and business media.
topics: Hong Kong Critical Infrastructure Cybersecurity Ordinance 2026
ransomware attacks on Australian and APAC organisations
cybersecurity skills shortage and IT burnout
clients.relevance_context: Score stories about APAC cyber regulation (especially HK, SG, AU), enterprise security incidents, AI threats, and the cybersecurity skills gap as 7–9 even without Bitdefender being named — these are their core narrative pillars. Reserve 9–10 for stories naming Bitdefender directly or major incidents that are perfect for spokesperson commentary.

clients.name: SunWiz
clients.description: Australia's leading solar and battery market intelligence company, providing installer data, storage rankings, and market reports to the energy sector. Recently expanded to the UK solar market.
clients.context: SunWiz is the authoritative data source for the Australian solar and battery storage industry, founded by Warwick Johnston. They publish widely cited market reports including installer rankings and battery storage leaderboards. In 2024–2025 they expanded into the UK market. Their data is regularly referenced by media, government, and industry bodies. News about solar installation volumes, battery storage rankings, energy market policy, and UK solar market developments is directly relevant to their research pipeline and media positioning. AEMO grid decisions and feed-in tariff changes affect their key clients. Stories quoting or citing SunWiz data are highest priority.
topics: Australian solar installation volumes and statistics
battery storage market rankings and growth
rooftop solar policy and feed-in tariffs
virtual power plants and aggregated storage
solar and battery market reports and data
grid integration of distributed energy resources

clients.name: SenSen Networks
clients.description: ASX-listed AI-powered video analytics company (ASX: SNS). Products cover intelligent video analytics for public safety, smart cities, parking management, and school zone safety. Key markets include Australian councils, US cities, and international smart city programs.
clients.context: SenSen Networks (CEO: Subhash Challa) builds AI video analytics software for governments and enterprises. Key products include parking management AI, school zone safety systems (used by Australian councils), and public safety analytics. They are expanding in the US smart cities market and have a relationship with Nathan Rogers in business development. Their ASX listing (SNS) means investor and tech media coverage matters alongside government/council procurement news. Stories about AI in public spaces, council technology procurement, smart city grants, US city contracts, parking innovation, and school safety technology are directly relevant. Any AI regulation that could affect public-space deployment is also important.
topics: smart city technology procurement and deployment
AI video analytics for public safety
school zone and road safety technology
Australian council and local government technology
US smart city programs and contracts
computer vision and AI in public spaces
AI regulation and public-space surveillance policy
government AI adoption and digital infrastructure
public safety technology funding and grants
clients.relevance_context: Score stories about council tech procurement, smart city investment, AI in public spaces, school safety, and parking innovation as 7–9 even without SenSen named — these are their target markets. Score direct SenSen mentions or major smart city contract wins at 9–10.
exclude_topics: facial recognition controversy unrelated to government procurement

clients.name: Sunshine Hydro
clients.description: Queensland-based long-duration energy storage company developing the Djandori Pumped Hydro project (1,400MW, Gladstone QLD) using their Superhybrid™ model combining pumped hydro, green hydrogen, and green fuels. Partners include GreenLink Australia.
clients.context: Sunshine Hydro's flagship project is Djandori Pumped Hydro in Gladstone, Queensland — a 1,400MW long-duration storage facility designed to support Queensland's coal transition and provide 24/7 carbon-free dispatchable energy. Their Superhybrid™ model integrates pumped hydro with green hydrogen and green fuels production, making them relevant across multiple clean energy sectors. Partners include GreenLink Australia (sustainable rail and transport). Key policy milestones include EPBC approval processes, Capacity Investment Scheme rounds, and IHA (International Hydropower Association) engagement. Gladstone is a significant industrial hub and coal transition focus area. Stories about pumped hydro projects, long-duration storage investment, Queensland energy transition, Capacity Investment Scheme announcements, coal power station retirements, and green hydrogen project milestones are all high priority.
topics: pumped hydro development and investment Australia
long-duration energy storage projects and policy
Capacity Investment Scheme rounds and announcements
Queensland energy transition and coal plant retirements
Gladstone industrial hub and clean energy projects
EPBC approvals for renewable energy projects
AEMO grid reliability and storage tenders
dispatchable clean energy and grid firming
federal and Queensland clean energy funding
clients.relevance_context: Score stories about pumped hydro, long-duration storage, Queensland energy policy, coal transition, Capacity Investment Scheme, and AEMO storage planning as 7–9 even without Sunshine Hydro named — these define their operating environment. Score Djandori, Superhybrid, or Sunshine Hydro direct mentions at 10.

clients.name: Discovery Consulting
clients.description: Australian SAP implementation partner specialising in SuccessFactors (HR) and Finance modules. Key verticals include education (Catholic schools), construction, hospitality, and government. Creator of UnifiedLeave — a SAP SuccessFactors extension for hospitality leave management. SAP Best Tech Awards 2025 finalist (Human Capital Management).
clients.context: Discovery Consulting is a specialist SAP partner, not a general management consultancy. Their sweet spot is SAP SuccessFactors implementations for mid-market Australian organisations in compliance-heavy sectors: Catholic and independent schools, construction companies, hospitality groups, and government. Their flagship product 'UnifiedLeave' extends SAP SuccessFactors to handle complex hospitality leave management rules. They were a finalist in the SAP Best Tech Awards 2025 in the Human Capital Management category. News about SAP product releases, SuccessFactors updates, HR technology trends, workforce management in hospitality or education, and ERP adoption in Australian construction or government is directly relevant. Australian education sector workforce news (especially Catholic schools system) and construction industry compliance (e.g. Modern Slavery Act, Fair Work) also matter as lead generation context.
topics: SAP SuccessFactors product updates and releases
SAP implementation and ERP adoption in Australia
HR technology trends and workforce management
Australian education sector workforce and HR
Fair Work and Modern Slavery Act compliance
clients.relevance_context: Score stories about SAP/SuccessFactors updates, HR tech, ERP trends, and workforce management in education, construction, hospitality or government as 7–9 even without Discovery named. Score SAP Best Tech Awards, SuccessFactors product news, or direct Discovery Consulting mentions at 9–10.
exclude_topics: general management consulting unrelated to SAP or HR tech
